title: nepeta latifolia
intro: Nepeta latifolia, also known as large-leaved catmint or broad-leaved catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta latifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal issues. Nepeta latifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
